---
title: "Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure"
---

# Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure

Range: `1351-1420`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 70    |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                         | Completion | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----- | -------------------------------------------- | ---------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1351  | [agent {AI}](#rune-1351)                     | authored   | A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 1352  | [alignment {AI}](#rune-1352)                 | authored   | `alignment` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the alignment obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1353  | [annotation set](#rune-1353)                 | authored   | `annotation set` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the annotation set obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1354  | [benchmark prompt](#rune-1354)               | authored   | `benchmark prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the benchmark prompt obligation named before work proceeds.                             |
| 1355  | [canonical form {AI}](#rune-1355)            | authored   | `canonical form` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the canonical form obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1356  | [citation](#rune-1356)                       | authored   | `citation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the citation obligation named before work proceeds.                                             |
| 1357  | [clause marker](#rune-1357)                  | authored   | `clause marker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the clause marker obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1358  | [constraint {AI}](#rune-1358)                | authored   | A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 1359  | [context](#rune-1359)                        | authored   | The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 1360  | [context window](#rune-1360)                 | authored   | `context window` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the context window obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1361  | [delegation](#rune-1361)                     | authored   | `delegation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the delegation obligation named before work proceeds.                                         |
| 1362  | [deterministic decoding](#rune-1362)         | authored   | `deterministic decoding` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the deterministic decoding obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1363  | [embedding {AI}](#rune-1363)                 | authored   | `embedding` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the embedding obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1364  | [evaluation {AI}](#rune-1364)                | authored   | The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 1365  | [evaluator](#rune-1365)                      | authored   | `evaluator` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the evaluator obligation named before work proceeds.                                           |
| 1366  | [example](#rune-1366)                        | authored   | `example` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the example obligation named before work proceeds.                                               |
| 1367  | [exemplar](#rune-1367)                       | authored   | `exemplar` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the exemplar obligation named before work proceeds.                                             |
| 1368  | [fallback {AI}](#rune-1368)                  | authored   | `fallback` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the fallback obligation named before work proceeds.                             |
| 1369  | [few-shot](#rune-1369)                       | authored   | `few-shot` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the few-shot obligation named before work proceeds.                                             |
| 1370  | [fine-tuning](#rune-1370)                    | authored   | `fine-tuning` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the fine-tuning obligation named before work proceeds.                                       |
| 1371  | [function call](#rune-1371)                  | authored   | `function call` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the function call obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1372  | [goal](#rune-1372)                           | authored   | `goal` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the goal obligation named before work proceeds.                                                     |
| 1373  | [grounding](#rune-1373)                      | authored   | Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 1374  | [guardrail](#rune-1374)                      | authored   | A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 1375  | [hallucination check](#rune-1375)            | authored   | `hallucination check` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the hallucination check obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1376  | [instruction {AI}](#rune-1376)               | authored   | `instruction` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the instruction obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1377  | [latent space](#rune-1377)                   | authored   | `latent space` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the latent space obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1378  | [memory {AI}](#rune-1378)                    | authored   | `memory` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the memory obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1379  | [message role](#rune-1379)                   | authored   | `message role` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the message role obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1380  | [multimodal](#rune-1380)                     | authored   | `multimodal` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the multimodal obligation named before work proceeds.                                         |
| 1381  | [normal form](#rune-1381)                    | authored   | `normal form` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the normal form obligation named before work proceeds.                                       |
| 1382  | [objective](#rune-1382)                      | authored   | The outcome the spell is trying to cause.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 1383  | [output contract](#rune-1383)                | authored   | The required shape the answer must take.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 1384  | [parser prompt](#rune-1384)                  | authored   | `parser prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the parser prompt obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1385  | [plan](#rune-1385)                           | authored   | `plan` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the plan obligation named before work proceeds.                                                     |
| 1386  | [planner](#rune-1386)                        | authored   | `planner` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the planner obligation named before work proceeds.                                               |
| 1387  | [policy prompt](#rune-1387)                  | authored   | `policy prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the policy prompt obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1388  | [procedure {AI}](#rune-1388)                 | authored   | `procedure` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the procedure obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1389  | [prompt](#rune-1389)                         | authored   | The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 1390  | [prompt injection](#rune-1390)               | authored   | `prompt injection` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the prompt injection obligation named before work proceeds.                             |
| 1391  | [prompt surface {AI}](#rune-1391)            | authored   | `prompt surface` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the prompt surface obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1392  | [ranking](#rune-1392)                        | authored   | `ranking` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the ranking obligation named before work proceeds.                                               |
| 1393  | [reasoning trace](#rune-1393)                | authored   | `reasoning trace` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the reasoning trace obligation named before work proceeds.                               |
| 1394  | [reranker](#rune-1394)                       | authored   | `reranker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the reranker obligation named before work proceeds.                                             |
| 1395  | [retrieval](#rune-1395)                      | authored   | Bring external evidence into the model's working context.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 1396  | [retrieval-augmented generation](#rune-1396) | authored   | `retrieval-augmented generation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the retrieval-augmented generation obligation named before work proceeds. |
| 1397  | [role {AI}](#rune-1397)                      | authored   | `role` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the role obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1398  | [rubric](#rune-1398)                         | authored   | `rubric` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the rubric obligation named before work proceeds.                                                 |
| 1399  | [safety rail](#rune-1399)                    | authored   | `safety rail` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the safety rail obligation named before work proceeds.                                       |
| 1400  | [scaffold {AI}](#rune-1400)                  | authored   | `scaffold` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the scaffold obligation named before work proceeds.                             |
| 1401  | [schema {AI}](#rune-1401)                    | authored   | `schema` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the schema obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1402  | [section marker](#rune-1402)                 | authored   | `section marker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the section marker obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1403  | [self-check](#rune-1403)                     | authored   | `self-check` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the self-check obligation named before work proceeds.                                         |
| 1404  | [shot](#rune-1404)                           | authored   | `shot` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the shot obligation named before work proceeds.                                                     |
| 1405  | [spell](#rune-1405)                          | authored   | A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 1406  | [spell number](#rune-1406)                   | authored   | `spell number` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the spell number obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1407  | [spell signature](#rune-1407)                | authored   | `spell signature` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the spell signature obligation named before work proceeds.                               |
| 1408  | [step list](#rune-1408)                      | authored   | `step list` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the step list obligation named before work proceeds.                                           |
| 1409  | [system prompt](#rune-1409)                  | authored   | The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 1410  | [task framing](#rune-1410)                   | authored   | `task framing` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the task framing obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1411  | [temperature](#rune-1411)                    | authored   | `temperature` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the temperature obligation named before work proceeds.                                       |
| 1412  | [token {AI}](#rune-1412)                     | authored   | `token` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the token obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1413  | [token stream](#rune-1413)                   | authored   | `token stream` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the token stream obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1414  | [tool call](#rune-1414)                      | authored   | A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 1415  | [toolformer pattern](#rune-1415)             | authored   | `toolformer pattern` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the toolformer pattern obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1416  | [top-k](#rune-1416)                          | authored   | `top-k` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the top-k obligation named before work proceeds.                                                   |
| 1417  | [top-p](#rune-1417)                          | authored   | `top-p` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the top-p obligation named before work proceeds.                                                   |
| 1418  | [user prompt](#rune-1418)                    | authored   | `user prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the user prompt obligation named before work proceeds.                                       |
| 1419  | [verification {AI}](#rune-1419)              | authored   | Truth-checking added to output generation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 1420  | [vocabulary id](#rune-1420)                  | authored   | `vocabulary id` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the vocabulary id obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |

## Entries

### [1351] agent {AI} {#rune-1351}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.

**Shadow:** misusing `agent` at rune 1351 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.

### [1352] alignment {AI} {#rune-1352}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `alignment` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the alignment obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `alignment` at rune 1352 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1353] annotation set {#rune-1353}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `annotation set` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the annotation set obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `annotation set` at rune 1353 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1354] benchmark prompt {#rune-1354}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `benchmark prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the benchmark prompt obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `benchmark prompt` at rune 1354 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1355] canonical form {AI} {#rune-1355}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `canonical form` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the canonical form obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `canonical form` at rune 1355 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1356] citation {#rune-1356}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `citation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the citation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `citation` at rune 1356 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1357] clause marker {#rune-1357}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `clause marker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the clause marker obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `clause marker` at rune 1357 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1358] constraint {AI} {#rune-1358}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.

**Shadow:** misusing `constraint` at rune 1358 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A bound that removes degrees of freedom in favor of correctness.

### [1359] context {#rune-1359}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.

**Shadow:** misusing `context` at rune 1359 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The surrounding facts that give the prompt its force.

### [1360] context window {#rune-1360}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `context window` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the context window obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `context window` at rune 1360 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1361] delegation {#rune-1361}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `delegation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the delegation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `delegation` at rune 1361 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1362] deterministic decoding {#rune-1362}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `deterministic decoding` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the deterministic decoding obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `deterministic decoding` at rune 1362 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1363] embedding {AI} {#rune-1363}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `embedding` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the embedding obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `embedding` at rune 1363 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1364] evaluation {AI} {#rune-1364}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.

**Shadow:** misusing `evaluation` at rune 1364 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The act of measuring whether the model is actually useful.

### [1365] evaluator {#rune-1365}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `evaluator` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the evaluator obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `evaluator` at rune 1365 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1366] example {#rune-1366}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `example` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the example obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `example` at rune 1366 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1367] exemplar {#rune-1367}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `exemplar` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the exemplar obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `exemplar` at rune 1367 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1368] fallback {AI} {#rune-1368}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `fallback` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the fallback obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `fallback` at rune 1368 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1369] few-shot {#rune-1369}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `few-shot` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the few-shot obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `few-shot` at rune 1369 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1370] fine-tuning {#rune-1370}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `fine-tuning` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the fine-tuning obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `fine-tuning` at rune 1370 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1371] function call {#rune-1371}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `function call` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the function call obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `function call` at rune 1371 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1372] goal {#rune-1372}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `goal` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the goal obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `goal` at rune 1372 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1373] grounding {#rune-1373}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.

**Shadow:** misusing `grounding` at rune 1373 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Tie generation to evidence instead of to free-association alone.

### [1374] guardrail {#rune-1374}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.

**Shadow:** misusing `guardrail` at rune 1374 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A boundary that narrows allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.

### [1375] hallucination check {#rune-1375}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `hallucination check` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the hallucination check obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `hallucination check` at rune 1375 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1376] instruction {AI} {#rune-1376}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `instruction` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the instruction obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `instruction` at rune 1376 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1377] latent space {#rune-1377}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `latent space` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the latent space obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `latent space` at rune 1377 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1378] memory {AI} {#rune-1378}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `memory` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the memory obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `memory` at rune 1378 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1379] message role {#rune-1379}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `message role` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the message role obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `message role` at rune 1379 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1380] multimodal {#rune-1380}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `multimodal` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the multimodal obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `multimodal` at rune 1380 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1381] normal form {#rune-1381}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `normal form` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the normal form obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `normal form` at rune 1381 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1382] objective {#rune-1382}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The outcome the spell is trying to cause.

**Shadow:** misusing `objective` at rune 1382 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The outcome the spell is trying to cause.

### [1383] output contract {#rune-1383}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The required shape the answer must take.

**Shadow:** misusing `output contract` at rune 1383 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The required shape the answer must take.

### [1384] parser prompt {#rune-1384}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `parser prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the parser prompt obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `parser prompt` at rune 1384 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1385] plan {#rune-1385}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `plan` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the plan obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `plan` at rune 1385 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1386] planner {#rune-1386}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `planner` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the planner obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `planner` at rune 1386 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1387] policy prompt {#rune-1387}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `policy prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the policy prompt obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `policy prompt` at rune 1387 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1388] procedure {AI} {#rune-1388}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `procedure` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the procedure obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `procedure` at rune 1388 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1389] prompt {#rune-1389}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.

**Shadow:** misusing `prompt` at rune 1389 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The surface instruction that biases a model toward task, role, and style.

### [1390] prompt injection {#rune-1390}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `prompt injection` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the prompt injection obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `prompt injection` at rune 1390 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1391] prompt surface {AI} {#rune-1391}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `prompt surface` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the prompt surface obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `prompt surface` at rune 1391 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1392] ranking {#rune-1392}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `ranking` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the ranking obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `ranking` at rune 1392 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1393] reasoning trace {#rune-1393}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `reasoning trace` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the reasoning trace obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `reasoning trace` at rune 1393 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1394] reranker {#rune-1394}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `reranker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the reranker obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `reranker` at rune 1394 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1395] retrieval {#rune-1395}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Bring external evidence into the model's working context.

**Shadow:** misusing `retrieval` at rune 1395 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Bring external evidence into the model's working context.

### [1396] retrieval-augmented generation {#rune-1396}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `retrieval-augmented generation` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the retrieval-augmented generation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `retrieval-augmented generation` at rune 1396 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1397] role {AI} {#rune-1397}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `role` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the role obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `role` at rune 1397 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1398] rubric {#rune-1398}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `rubric` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the rubric obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `rubric` at rune 1398 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1399] safety rail {#rune-1399}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `safety rail` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the safety rail obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `safety rail` at rune 1399 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1400] scaffold {AI} {#rune-1400}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `scaffold` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the scaffold obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `scaffold` at rune 1400 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1401] schema {AI} {#rune-1401}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `schema` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the schema obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `schema` at rune 1401 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1402] section marker {#rune-1402}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `section marker` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the section marker obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `section marker` at rune 1402 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1403] self-check {#rune-1403}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `self-check` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the self-check obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `self-check` at rune 1403 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1404] shot {#rune-1404}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `shot` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the shot obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `shot` at rune 1404 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1405] spell {#rune-1405}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.

**Shadow:** misusing `spell` at rune 1405 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, and checks.

### [1406] spell number {#rune-1406}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `spell number` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the spell number obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `spell number` at rune 1406 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1407] spell signature {#rune-1407}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `spell signature` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the spell signature obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `spell signature` at rune 1407 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1408] step list {#rune-1408}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `step list` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the step list obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `step list` at rune 1408 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1409] system prompt {#rune-1409}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.

**Shadow:** misusing `system prompt` at rune 1409 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** The highest-order framing instruction in the conversation.

### [1410] task framing {#rune-1410}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `task framing` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the task framing obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `task framing` at rune 1410 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1411] temperature {#rune-1411}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `temperature` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the temperature obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `temperature` at rune 1411 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1412] token {AI} {#rune-1412}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `token` in its AI sense is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the token obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `token` at rune 1412 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1413] token stream {#rune-1413}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `token stream` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the token stream obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `token stream` at rune 1413 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1414] tool call {#rune-1414}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.

**Shadow:** misusing `tool call` at rune 1414 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** A step where the model reaches beyond text into external action.

### [1415] toolformer pattern {#rune-1415}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `toolformer pattern` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the toolformer pattern obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `toolformer pattern` at rune 1415 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1416] top-k {#rune-1416}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `top-k` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the top-k obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `top-k` at rune 1416 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1417] top-p {#rune-1417}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `top-p` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the top-p obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `top-p` at rune 1417 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1418] user prompt {#rune-1418}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `user prompt` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the user prompt obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `user prompt` at rune 1418 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

### [1419] verification {AI} {#rune-1419}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Truth-checking added to output generation.

**Shadow:** misusing `verification` at rune 1419 in the AI lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.

**Pocket gloss:** Truth-checking added to output generation.

### [1420] vocabulary id {#rune-1420}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `vocabulary id` is a promptcraft and AI-assisted engineering rune for bind model behavior to role, context, output contract, and evidence; use it when the artifact needs the vocabulary id obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `vocabulary id` at rune 1420 in the promptcraft lane can let the model can satisfy request shape while inventing unsupported substance; verify by requiring the caster to state the artifact, constraints, verification, and failure behavior.
